<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Sayed Wajahat Ali Shah - Cybersecurity Profile</title>
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Share+Tech+Mono&family=Orbitron:wght@400;700;900&display=swap');
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
body{background:#060a06;color:#00ff88;font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;min-height:100vh;}
.scanline{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,transparent,transparent 2px,rgba(0,255,136,0.01) 2px,rgba(0,255,136,0.01) 4px);pointer-events:none;z-index:999;}
.container{max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;padding:2rem 1rem;}

/* HEADER */
.header{text-align:center;padding:2rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid #00ff8822;margin-bottom:2rem;}
.avatar{width:100px;height:100px;border-radius:50%;border:2px solid #00ff88;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:26px;font-weight:900;color:#00ff88;background:#0a0e0a;box-shadow:0 0 30px #00ff8844;margin:0 auto 1rem;animation:pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 20px #00ff8844;}50%{box-shadow:0 0 40px #00ff8866;}}
h1{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:3px;color:#00ff88;}
.role{font-size:0.8rem;color:#00ff8888;letter-spacing:4px;margin-top:6px;}
.cursor{display:inline-block;width:8px;height:16px;background:#00ff88;animation:blink 1s step-end infinite;vertical-align:middle;margin-left:2px;}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0;}}

/* SECTION */
.section-title{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:0.7rem;color:#00ff88;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;border-left:3px solid #00ff88;padding-left:10px;margin:2rem 0 1rem;}

/* STATUS BADGES - CLICKABLE */
.badges-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.badge{padding:8px 16px;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.72rem;font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;letter-spacing:1px;border:1px solid;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.2s;cursor:pointer;}
.badge:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(0,255,136,0.2);}
.badge-green{background:#00ff8811;border-color:#00ff8844;color:#00ff88;}
.badge-blue{background:#00aaff11;border-color:#00aaff44;color:#00aaff;}
.badge-red{background:#ff004411;border-color:#ff004444;color:#ff4466;}
.badge-amber{background:#ffaa0011;border-color:#ffaa0044;color:#ffaa00;}
.badge-purple{background:#aa00ff11;border-color:#aa00ff44;color:#cc66ff;}
.dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:currentColor;display:inline-block;animation:blink 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;}

/* REPO LINKS */
.repos-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.repo-card{background:#0d140d;border:1px solid #00ff8822;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;text-decoration:none;display:block;transition:all 0.25s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.repo-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#00ff88,transparent);transform:translateX(-100%);transition:transform 0.4s;}
.repo-card:hover::before{transform:translateX(0);}
.repo-card:hover{border-color:#00ff8844;transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,255,136,0.1);}
.repo-icon{font-size:1.2rem;margin-bottom:6px;}
.repo-name{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:0.7rem;color:#00ff88;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;}
.repo-desc{font-size:0.62rem;color:#00ff8866;margin-top:4px;line-height:1.5;}
.repo-num{position:absolute;top:10px;right:12px;font-size:0.6rem;color:#00ff8833;font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;}

/* CERTIFICATES */
.certs-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:14px;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.cert-card{background:#0d140d;border:1px solid #00ff8822;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.25s;position:relative;}
.cert-card:hover{border-color:#00ff8855;transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 8px 25px rgba(0,255,136,0.15);}
.cert-img-wrap{position:relative;height:160px;overflow:hidden;background:#060a06;}
.cert-img-wrap img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:grayscale(20%) saturate(1.2);transition:filter 0.3s;}
.cert-card:hover .cert-img-wrap img{filter:grayscale(0%) saturate(1.5);}
.cert-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent 50%,#0d140d);}
.cert-scan{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#00ff88,transparent);animation:scan-line 2s linear infinite;}
@keyframes scan-line{0%{top:0;opacity:1;}100%{top:100%;opacity:0;}}
.cert-info{padding:10px 12px;}
.cert-name{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:0.68rem;color:#00ff88;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;}
.cert-issuer{font-size:0.6rem;color:#00ff8866;margin-top:3px;}
.cert-status{font-size:0.58rem;color:#00ff88;margin-top:5px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.verified-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:#00ff88;animation:blink 1s ease-in-out infinite;}

/* MODAL */
.modal{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85);z-index:1000;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.modal.open{display:flex;}
.modal-inner{background:#0a0e0a;border:1px solid #00ff8833;border-radius:12px;max-width:800px;width:90%;max-height:90vh;overflow:auto;position:relative;}
.modal-img{width:100%;display:block;border-radius:12px 12px 0 0;}
.modal-close{position:absolute;top:12px;right:14px;background:#00ff8811;border:1px solid #00ff8844;color:#00ff88;font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:0.8rem;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;}
.modal-close:hover{background:#00ff8822;}
.modal-footer{padding:12px 16px;font-size:0.7rem;color:#00ff8877;}

/* SKILLS */
.skills-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.skill-item{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;}
.skill-label{font-size:0.65rem;color:#00ff8888;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;letter-spacing:1px;}
.skill-bar{height:4px;background:#00ff8811;border-radius:2px;border:1px solid #00ff8822;}
.skill-fill{height:100%;background:#00ff88;border-radius:2px;width:0;transition:width 1.5s ease-out;}

/* STATS */
.stats-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.stat-box{background:#0d140d;border:1px solid #00ff8822;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;text-align:center;}
.stat-num{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;color:#00ff88;}
.stat-label{font-size:0.58rem;color:#00ff8866;letter-spacing:2px;margin-top:4px;}

/* FOOTER */
.footer{border-top:1px solid #00ff8811;padding-top:1.5rem;text-align:center;font-size:0.65rem;color:#00ff8855;margin-top:1rem;}
.footer a{color:#00ff8888;text-decoration:none;margin:0 8px;}
.footer a:hover{color:#00ff88;}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="scanline"></div>
<div class="container">

  <!-- HEADER -->
  <div class="header">
    <div class="avatar">SW</div>
    <h1>SAYED WAJAHAT ALI SHAH</h1>
    <div class="role">&gt; CYBERSECURITY SPECIALIST &amp; ETHICAL HACKER &lt;</div>
    <div style="margin-top:10px;font-size:0.8rem;color:#00ff88cc;">&gt; Protecting digital assets, one packet at a time<span class="cursor"></span></div>
  </div>

  <!-- STATUS - CLICKABLE LINKS -->
  <div class="section-title">// Status &amp; Platforms</div>
  <div class="badges-grid">
    <a class="badge badge-green" href="https://github.com/sherazi1214" target="_blank"><span class="dot"></span> GitHub</a>
    <a class="badge badge-blue" href="https://tryhackme.com" target="_blank"><span class="dot"></span> TryHackMe</a>
    <a class="badge badge-red" href="https://app.hackthebox.com" target="_blank"><span class="dot"></span> HackTheBox</a>
    <a class="badge badge-amber" href="#" target="_blank"><span class="dot"></span> CTF Player</a>
    <a class="badge badge-purple" href="https://linkedin.com" target="_blank"><span class="dot"></span> LinkedIn</a>
    <a class="badge badge-green" href="https://github.com/sherazi1214/Cyber-Security-Full-tutorial" target="_blank"><span class="dot"></span> Full Tutorial Repo</a>
  </div>

  <!-- REPO LINKS -->
  <div class="section-title">// Cybersecurity Learning Repos</div>
  <div class="repos-grid">
    <a class="repo-card" href="https://github.com/sherazi1214/Introduction-to-Cyber-Security/blob/main/README.md" target="_blank">
      <div class="repo-num">01</div>
      <div class="repo-icon">🔐</div>
      <div class="repo-name">Intro to Cyber Security</div>
      <div class="repo-desc">Foundations of cybersecurity — core concepts, threats &amp; defenses</div>
    </a>
    <a class="repo-card" href="https://github.com/sherazi1214/fundamentals-of-networking" target="_blank">
      <div class="repo-num">02</div>
      <div class="repo-icon">🌐</div>
      <div class="repo-name">Networking Fundamentals</div>
      <div class="repo-desc">Protocols, OSI model, TCP/IP and network architecture</div>
    </a>
    <a class="repo-card" href="https://github.com/sherazi1214/Linux-fundamentals" target="_blank">
      <div class="repo-num">03</div>
      <div class="repo-icon">🐧</div>
      <div class="repo-name">Linux Fundamentals</div>
      <div class="repo-desc">Command line, file system, permissions and scripting</div>
    </a>
    <a class="repo-card" href="https://github.com/sherazi1214/comptia-security-/blob/main/README.md" target="_blank">
      <div class="repo-num">04</div>
      <div class="repo-icon">🛡️</div>
      <div class="repo-name">CompTIA Security+</div>
      <div class="repo-desc">Full Security+ course notes and study materials</div>
    </a>
    <a class="repo-card" href="https://github.com/sherazi1214/Ethical-Hacking-Basic-to-advance" target="_blank">
      <div class="repo-num">05</div>
      <div class="repo-icon">⚔️</div>
      <div class="repo-name">Ethical Hacking</div>
      <div class="repo-desc">Basic to advanced ethical hacking techniques</div>
    </a>
    <a class="repo-card" href="https://github.com/sherazi1214/CYBERSECURITY-DOMAINS-ROADMAP" target="_blank">
      <div class="repo-num">06</div>
      <div class="repo-icon">🗺️</div>
      <div class="repo-name">Cybersec Domains Roadmap</div>
      <div class="repo-desc">10 domains — skills, tools, certs &amp; career paths (2025)</div>
    </a>
    <a class="repo-card" href="https://github.com/sherazi1214/CompTia-pentest" target="_blank">
      <div class="repo-num">07</div>
      <div class="repo-icon">💉</div>
      <div class="repo-name">CompTIA PenTest+</div>
      <div class="repo-desc">Penetration testing methodology and tools</div>
    </a>
    <a class="repo-card" href="https://github.com/sherazi1214/Cyber-Security-Full-tutorial" target="_blank">
      <div class="repo-num">⭐</div>
      <div class="repo-icon">📚</div>
      <div class="repo-name">Full Tutorial Hub</div>
      <div class="repo-desc">Master repo — all cybersecurity learning in one place</div>
    </a>
  </div>

  <!-- CERTIFICATES -->
  <div class="section-title">// Certifications — Click to View</div>
  <div class="certs-grid" id="certs-grid">
    <!-- Populated by JS -->
  </div>

  <!-- SKILLS -->
  <div class="section-title">// Arsenal</div>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-label"><span>Network Pentesting</span><span>92%</span></div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-w="92"></div></div></div>
    <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-label"><span>Web App Security</span><span>88%</span></div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-w="88"></div></div></div>
    <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-label"><span>Linux / Kali</span><span>90%</span></div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-w="90"></div></div></div>
    <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-label"><span>OSINT</span><span>85%</span></div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-w="85"></div></div></div>
    <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-label"><span>Python Scripting</span><span>80%</span></div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-w="80"></div></div></div>
    <div class="skill-item"><div class="skill-label"><span>Malware Analysis</span><span>75%</span></div><div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-w="75"></div></div></div>
  </div>

  <!-- STATS -->
  <div class="section-title">// Stats</div>
  <div class="stats-row">
    <div class="stat-box"><div class="stat-num">7</div><div class="stat-label">Certificates</div></div>
    <div class="stat-box"><div class="stat-num">7+</div><div class="stat-label">Repos</div></div>
    <div class="stat-box"><div class="stat-num">🇵🇰</div><div class="stat-label">Pakistan</div></div>
  </div>

  <div class="footer">
    <div style="margin-bottom:8px;">"Hack to Protect, Not to Destroy"</div>
    <a href="https://github.com/sherazi1214" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
    <a href="https://linkedin.com" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
    <a href="mailto:wajahat.sec@proton.me">Email</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MODAL -->
<div class="modal" id="modal">
  <div class="modal-inner">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal()">[ CLOSE ]</button>
    <img class="modal-img" id="modal-img" src="" alt="Certificate">
    <div class="modal-footer" id="modal-footer"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const CERTS = {
  ctf_participation: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  cisco_intro: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  cybersec_essentials_uk: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  advent_of_cyber: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  tcm_security: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  web_fundamentals: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  google_cybersec: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
};


const certData = [
  { key:"google_cybersec", name:"Google Cybersecurity", issuer:"Google / Coursera", date:"Mar 2025", status:"VERIFIED" },
  { key:"cisco_intro", name:"Intro to Cybersecurity", issuer:"Cisco Networking Academy", date:"Jan 2025", status:"VERIFIED" },
  { key:"tcm_security", name:"Practical Security Fundamentals", issuer:"TCM Security", date:"Feb 2026", status:"VERIFIED" },
  { key:"web_fundamentals", name:"Web Fundamentals Learning Path", issuer:"TryHackMe", date:"Jan 2026", status:"VERIFIED" },
  { key:"advent_of_cyber", name:"Advent of Cyber 2025", issuer:"TryHackMe", date:"Dec 2025", status:"VERIFIED" },
  { key:"cybersec_essentials_uk", name:"Cybersec Essentials for UK Workforce", issuer:"Knights of Safety", date:"Apr 2026", status:"VERIFIED" },
  { key:"ctf_participation", name:"Love at First Breach CTF", issuer:"TryHackMe", date:"Feb 2026", status:"PARTICIPATED" },
];

const grid = document.getElementById('certs-grid');
certData.forEach(c => {
  const card = document.createElement('div');
  card.className = 'cert-card';
  card.onclick = () => openModal(c);
  card.innerHTML = `
    <div class="cert-img-wrap">
      <img src="${CERTS[c.key]}" alt="${c.name}" loading="lazy">
      <div class="cert-overlay"></div>
      <div class="cert-scan"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-info">
      <div class="cert-name">${c.name}</div>
      <div class="cert-issuer">${c.issuer}</div>
      <div class="cert-status"><span class="verified-dot"></span>${c.status} · ${c.date}</div>
    </div>
  `;
  grid.appendChild(card);
});

function openModal(c) {
  document.getElementById('modal-img').src = CERTS[c.key];
  document.getElementById('modal-footer').textContent = c.name + ' · ' + c.issuer + ' · ' + c.date;
  document.getElementById('modal').classList.add('open');
}

function closeModal() {
  document.getElementById('modal').classList.remove('open');
}

document.getElementById('modal').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  if(e.target === this) closeModal();
});

// Animate skill bars
setTimeout(() => {
  document.querySelectorAll('.skill-fill').forEach(el => {
    el.style.width = el.dataset.w + '%';
  });
}, 300);
</script>
</body>
</html>
